seoTitle: Point Leo vs Point Wilson — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Point Leo and Point Wilson. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Point Leo vs Point Wilson: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Point Leo and Point Wilson.
heading: Point Leo vs Point Wilson — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Point Leo, Victoria and Point Wilson, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Point Leo has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Point Wilson (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Point Leo or Point Wilson safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Point Leo has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Point Wilson scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Point Leo scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Point Wilson scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Point Leo or Point Wilson?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Point Leo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
